personal.name: Gyana Prakash Khandual
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building intelligent tools that reduce manual effort.

projects.name: CaffeTest
projects.tagline: AI-powered bug tracking & test management platform.
projects.description: CaffeTest is a comprehensive bug tracking and test management platform designed to automate and streamline software testing workflows. Integrates AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium automation scripts and identify failures as bugs.
features: AI Test Case Generation from Selenium Scripts
projects.standout: VS Code extension leverages Anthropic AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium scripts and detect failures as bugs — making CaffeTest far more intelligent than Jira or Zephyr.

projects.name: TodoTech
projects.tagline: Cross-platform desktop task management powered by Spring Boot.
projects.description: A full-featured desktop task management application built with Electron for the UI layer and Spring Boot (Java) for the backend logic. PostgreSQL handles data persistence with deployment on Render and Vercel.
projects.standout: Bridges the gap between native desktop experience and enterprise-grade Java backend using the Electron + Spring Boot stack.

projects.name: Playwright Web Test Suite
projects.tagline: End-to-end automation testing framework for modern web applications.
projects.description: A robust end-to-end testing suite built with Playwright covering UI flows, API validation, and cross-browser compatibility for complex web applications. Designed for CI/CD integration and scalable test coverage.
projects.standout: Built with scalability in mind — POM architecture and parameterized tests make it easy to scale coverage without duplicating code.

projects.name: Selenium Cucumber VS Code Extension
projects.tagline: Supercharge your Selenium + Cucumber BDD workflow inside VS Code.
projects.description: A VS Code marketplace extension that brings Selenium and Cucumber BDD tooling directly into the editor. Provides syntax highlighting, step definition navigation, snippet support, and AI-powered test generation.
features: Syntax highlighting for Cucumber feature files
projects.standout: Integrates Anthropic AI APIs to auto-generate test cases from Selenium scripts — turning hours of manual work into seconds.

projects.name: Taar — Speak & Write Any Language
projects.tagline: Break language barriers — translate, speak, and write in any language.
projects.description: Taar is a powerful Chrome extension that enables users to speak and write in any language, covering translation between any pair of languages. Designed for global users who need seamless multilingual communication in their browser.
features: Speak in any language via voice input
Write in any language with translation support
projects.standout: A truly universal language tool — not just translate, but speak and write, covering every major language pair.

projects.name: Jarvis — AI Assistant
projects.tagline: Your personal AI assistant powered by RAG and advanced data modelling.
projects.description: Jarvis is a Python-based AI assistant that leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for intelligent, context-aware responses. Built with advanced data modelling pipelines and supports domain-specific knowledge bases.
projects.standout: Goes beyond simple Q&A — Jarvis uses RAG to ground responses in your actual data, eliminating hallucinations for domain-specific queries.
